ns0:entry.ns0:title: 1812z/HyperIsland
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/1812z/HyperIsland
Language: dart
HyperOS 3 Dynamic Island Enhancer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cateners/tiny_computer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cateners/tiny_computer
Language: dart
Click-to-run debian 13 with desktop environment on android for Chinese users, with fcitx pinyin input method and some useful packages preinstalled. You don't need to install Termux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenisovAV/flutter_gemma
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenisovAV/flutter_gemma
Language: dart
The Flutter plugin allows running the Gemma AI model locally on a device from a Flutter application.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImranR98/Obtainium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium
Language: dart
Get Android app updates straight from the source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TomBursch/kitchenowl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TomBursch/kitchenowl
Language: dart
KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
Language: dart
A modern, secure VPN application built with Flutter that provides internet freedom and privacy protection.

URL: https://github.com/bggRGjQaUbCoE/PiliPlus

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chen08209/FlClash
Language: dart
A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/omnimind-ai/OpenOmniBot
Language: dart
Your on-phone / mobile AI Agent / Claw, capable of operating terminals and performing a wide range of tasks in the Android world || 你的手机 AI 代理，她可以操作终端，也可以完成 Android 世界的广泛任务

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shiyi-0x7f/olib-mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shiyi-0x7f/olib-mobile
Language: dart
🤖 An open-source ebook reader built entirely with AI assistance. Third-party client, frontend interface only.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
Language: dart
A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
